name: Antarctica 88
short_description: Uncover the chilling secrets beneath the Antarctic ice in this survival horror FPS. Shoot unimaginable creatures, solve cryptic puzzles, and fight for your life in the frozen wastelands.​
detailed_description:
Welcome to Antarctica 88 – a terrifying sci-fi survival horror experience.

In this intense first-person adventure, you'll uncover the chilling secrets buried beneath the Antarctic ice. Monsters, mystery, and madness await. Will you survive the cold… or join the silence?

You are part of a four-man rescue team sent to Antarctica-1, a remote research station where your father, Dr. Vladimir Efimov, was leading a drilling operation to explore ancient ice cores. Communication with the expedition stopped six weeks ago. Now, something in the ice is awake.

🧊 Explore, fight, and survive as you face horrifying creatures hidden in the darkness.

🧠 Solve environmental puzzles, uncover the truth, and make choices that shape the outcome of your story.

🔫 Use weapons and items you collect to fight back against mutated monsters… but choose wisely — resources are limited.

Key Features:

🧩 A branching sci-fi horror story with multiple endings

🧟‍♂️ Several types of mutant monsters and weapons to use

🎵 Original soundtrack designed to immerse you in the nightmare

🧠 Hardcore puzzles and item-based progression

❄️ An unforgettable atmosphere of tension, mystery, and dread

Your decisions determine your fate. Antarctica 88 features multiple endings, so replay the game to uncover all paths, secrets, and story threads. Can you reveal the whole truth... or will the ice claim you too? 💀

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
